title: Government Major Projects Portfolio: Senior Responsible Owners list – 2023 to 2024
body: "The guidance for officials giving evidence to Parliamentary Select Committees, known as the Osmotherly Rules, was updated on 17 October 2014. As part of this update government is committed to publishing lists of the SROs for projects on the GMPP.  To address this commitment the Infrastructure and Projects Authority (IPA) publishes lists of the SROs responsible for government major projects.  This aims to improve transparency and accountability for the government’s major projects. "
